blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a cancellable or revertible consequence lifecycle.

blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the consequence lifecycle can be cancelled or reverted.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a cancellable or revertible consequence lifecycle.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a cancellable or revertible consequence lifecycle.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the consequence lifecycle that can be cancelled or reverted. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records demonstrating the existence of such a lifecycle. While the linked use case mentions the need for a cancellable consequence lifecycle, there are no concrete examples or data points in the prior step evidence that confirm its implementation or coverage, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
gaps: No evidence of lifecycle states for cancelled or reverted consequences.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the consequence lifecycle can be cancelled or reverted.
